description.p: HelixNotes is a local-first markdown note-taking app built with Tauri, SvelteKit, and Rust. Your notes are stored as standard Markdown files on your local file system. No cloud, no lock-in.

ul.li: Your notes are .md files you can read with cat. No proprietary database, no lock-in, no hostage situation.
No telemetry. No cloud. No accounts. No phone-home. Your notes never leave your machine unless you decide otherwise.
TipTap v3 WYSIWYG with slash commands, tables, code blocks, and a source mode toggle. A clean editor that works out of the box.
Wiki Links and Graph: See how your ideas connect in the interactive graph view.
